days.agentEnergySummary: The protected result was nearly completed without evidence of depletion.
days.evidence: 170 of 180 critical-path minutes; reviewable output saved; no unplanned work.
days.inference: Capacity appears usable but not unlimited.

days.agentEnergySummary: Critical-path time exceeded plan while the weekly change stayed bounded.
days.evidence: 190 of 180 critical-path minutes; reordered output completed.
days.inference: Drive was strong and the plan remained feasible.

days.agentEnergySummary: The catch-up plan was mostly executed, with lower remaining energy.
days.evidence: 105 of 120 compressed critical-path minutes; no capacity overrun.
days.inference: Execution was adequate, but the shortened window reduced reserve.

days.reason: Morning-only rollback scenario has no evening report.

days.agentEnergySummary: Output and focus were high, but the report also contains fatigue evidence.
days.evidence: 220 of 180 critical-path minutes; month-critical result completed.
days.inference: High realized drive may coexist with low remaining reserve.

days.reason: Sunday review and travel day has no daily evening workbench.

days.agentEnergySummary: The successor phase started with strong execution and moderate reserve.
Reduced focus and illness evidence agree with low remaining energy.
days.evidence: 60 of 90 reduced critical-path minutes; illness explicitly recorded.
days.inference: Low drive reflects condition rather than plan avoidance.

days.reason: Closure-required morning stopped before daily planning and evening reporting.

days.agentEnergySummary: The planned critical work and closure evidence were both completed.
days.evidence: 180 critical-path minutes; due goal closed with evidence.
days.inference: Completion reduced friction for the next start.

days.agentEnergySummary: Execution was strong, while remaining reserve was only moderate.
days.evidence: 210 critical-path minutes; partial closure and successor recorded.
days.inference: Strong output should not be treated as spare capacity.

days.agentEnergySummary: Focus was above baseline and the terminal decision removed ambiguity.
days.evidence: 195 critical-path minutes; missed outcome and disposition recorded.
days.inference: Clear closure supports a normal next start.

days.reason: Sunday audit has no daily evening workbench.

days.agentEnergySummary: The baseline was completed and late work stayed recorded as unplanned.
days.evidence: 185 critical-path minutes; 45 unplanned minutes recorded without regeneration.
days.inference: Removing an obsolete commitment improved focus without hiding displacement.
